title: Frequently Asked Questions
subtitle: Quick answers to common questions about our web development services.

items.q: How much does a website cost?
items.a: Website cost depends on features, number of pages, and project complexity.

items.q: How long does it take to develop a website?
items.a: Most business websites are completed within 1–3 weeks, depending on project requirements.
Yes. We offer ongoing maintenance, updates, and performance optimization services.
